case_title: RODRIGO CARRENO VS. WOODS REMODELING, INC. A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRENO, RODRIGO AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS REMODELING, INC. A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
